default_validation_gates.summary: Do not claim completion until the changed boundary was exercised by a real check.
default_validation_gates.command_hint: Run at least one direct proof command for the touched boundary.

default_validation_gates.summary: Update repo-local operating context when work changes startup order, constraints, or verification commands.
default_validation_gates.command_hint: Refresh `.acb/profile/selection.json`, project profile, or startup docs when truth changed.

backend-api-service.summary: Boot the service and prove the health endpoint plus one representative route.
backend-api-service.command_hint: Exercise the health route and one non-trivial handler.

backend-api-service.summary: When handlers touch storage, prove at least one real round-trip through the storage boundary.
backend-api-service.command_hint: Use the repo-local test stack and avoid fake-only persistence checks.

cli-tool.summary: Validate help output, one happy-path command, and one failure-path command.
cli-tool.command_hint: Prove exit code and output shape explicitly.

data-acquisition-service.summary: Prove one end-to-end acquisition path from fetch through normalize and persist.
data-acquisition-service.command_hint: Use small deterministic fixtures when the upstream source is unstable.

data-acquisition-service.summary: Re-run the same acquisition step and prove replay or dedupe behavior is safe.
data-acquisition-service.command_hint: The second run must not silently duplicate or corrupt persisted state.

multi-source-sync-platform.summary: Prove a representative multi-source sync path and checkpoint progression.
multi-source-sync-platform.command_hint: Show one combined sync or coordination test, not only isolated unit checks.

multi-source-sync-platform.summary: Validate checkpoint, offset, or event durability behavior for interrupted runs.
multi-source-sync-platform.command_hint: Replay or resume must leave state coherent.

multi-backend-service.summary: Prove one real seam contract across services, not only isolated service-local tests.
multi-backend-service.command_hint: Use HTTP, gRPC, or event-contract checks against the actual seam.

python-fastapi-uv-ruff-orjson-polars.summary: Validate JSON response shape and status semantics at the FastAPI surface.
python-fastapi-uv-ruff-orjson-polars.command_hint: Use the app factory or running server to prove route contracts.

typescript-hono-bun.summary: Validate route behavior with Bun tests or an equivalent request harness.
typescript-hono-bun.command_hint: Prove the exact route path and payload contract.

go-echo.summary: Validate Echo handler status codes and response serialization.
go-echo.command_hint: Prove at least one handler using a real request path.

prompt-first-repo.summary: Validate prompt numbering, startup files, and generated profile integrity.
prompt-first-repo.command_hint: Run the repo-local validation script for prompt-first repos.

api.summary: Prove request and response contracts for one representative endpoint.
api.command_hint: Use exact payload and status assertions.

cli.summary: Check the operator-facing command path, flags, and failure messaging.
cli.command_hint: Capture stderr and exit code for at least one invalid invocation.

pipelines.summary: Run one deterministic pipeline path on a small fixture and check output shape.
pipelines.command_hint: Prefer replayable sample data over broad production inputs.

workers.summary: Validate worker startup, work claim behavior, and one bounded work item.
workers.command_hint: Do not treat process boot alone as sufficient proof.

frontend.summary: When the repo serves UI fragments or pages, validate one representative behavior path.
frontend.command_hint: Prefer browser-level or fragment-level proof when the change affects interaction.

scraping.summary: Validate source fetch, parse, and normalization behavior against a stable sample.
scraping.command_hint: Record how retries, throttling, and source quirks are handled.

eventing.summary: Validate publish/consume flow or explicit queue semantics for one representative event.
eventing.command_hint: Prove ack, retry, or dead-letter behavior when relevant.

storage.summary: Validate schema assumptions, key invariants, and one persisted-state assertion.
storage.command_hint: Check shape, uniqueness, and lifecycle assumptions explicitly.

rag.summary: Validate one indexing path and one retrieval query over a deterministic corpus.
rag.command_hint: Use fixed fixtures and stable embeddings assumptions when possible.

cloud-deployment.summary: Validate deployment-facing files, runtime assumptions, and a readiness check path.
cloud-deployment.command_hint: Do not mark deployable until build, runtime, and health assumptions are explicit.
